title: Maha Tower
summary: There is lots of politics in Malaysia. They were building this tower as a tribute to a politician and he then went out of favour. The project was put on hold and eventually restarted. From foundations in 2014 the tower opened in September. Nice views of Langkawi and a nice way to spend an hour or two. But Malaysians seem to be unimpressed. On the day I went…
content: There is lots of politics in Malaysia.  They were building this tower as a tribute to a politician and he then went out of favour.  The project was put on hold and eventually restarted.  From foundations in 2014 the tower opened in September.  Nice views of Langkawi and a nice way to spend an hour or two. But Malaysians seem to be unimpressed.  On the day I went I counted eight visitors to 15 staff…
